content.claim: Hungary operates 4-, 6-, and 8-year gimnázium tracks, with 8-year entry at age 10 and 6-year entry at age 12, placing it among the earliest-tracking OECD systems alongside Austria and Germany.
content.context: Fresh live research through the School network planning lens
limitations: Source is a general OECD reference rather than a Hungary-specific policy document
Does not provide longitudinal trend data on when these tracks were formally introduced
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
